category_sources: source_facts.description says Grafana Alloy is an OpenTelemetry Collector distribution with programmable pipelines; official docs describe Alloy as an open source telemetry collector.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is grafana-alloy and official docs at https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/ use Grafana Alloy.
docs_sources: Official Grafana Alloy documentation is published at https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grafana/alloy, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Alloy docs describe OpenTelemetry collection, programmable pipelines, and telemetry signals including metrics, logs, and traces.
